arts.ttl: Newcastle United and Aston Villa keen on La Liga playmaker that has accumulated 13 assists in 2024
arts.sum: Alex Baena has been one of La Liga’s best players in the last 12 months, of that there is no doubt. Last season, he topped the assist charts with 14, and already in this campaign, he has managed to amass another four, including two in Villarreal’s midweek victory at Espanyol. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa and Newcastle to battle for versatile €55m-rated La Liga winger
arts.sum: Both Unai Emery and Eddie Howe can be rightly pleased by the way in which Aston Villa and Newcastle respectively have begun their 2024/25 campaigns. arts.ttl: The two Newcastle United changes Eddie Howe has been urged to make for Man City
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans XI to face Manchester City: Pope; Trippier, Schar, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton; Barnes, Gordon Isak. The talking is about to stop as Newcastle United get ready for the biggest test of their credential so far this season, In fact, there's unlikely to be a tougher test than facing Premier League champions Manchester City.
